data.body: PIVOT (per new AGENTS.md guidance: review in dependency order, a review is invalidated when a dependency changes after it): stop re-reviewing 21ca NOW — it is the stack TOP and 625b/eefd will change its deps (test_backend_neutrality.py, _backend.py InboundMapper, outbound_differ). 21ca plan is remediated (3 rounds: :134 decode->normalize_rich_text; _normalize_adf_body public surface stays+applier drops 3 re-exports; single fit_comment name, adf=decode-only). Will review+claim 21ca LAST against final base. Proceed bottom-up: 625b -> eefd -> 21ca. 625b review running.
